_shorthelp: Grid displays data in a Grid. jqWidgets (Commercial)

_altrows.desc: Enables or disables the alternating rows.

_autoheight.desc: Sets the height of the grid to be equal to the summary height of the grid rows. This option should be set when the Grid is in paging mode.

_autoloadstate.desc: Determines whether the Grid automatically loads its current state(if there's already saved one). The Grid's state is loaded when the page is refreshed.

_autosavestate.desc: Determines whether the Grid automatically saves its current state.

_autoshowcolumnsmenubutton.desc: Sets whether the columns menu button will be displayed only when the mouse cursor is over a columns header or will be always displayed.

_autoshowfiltericon.desc: Displays the filter icon only when the column is filtered. When the value of this property is set to false, all grid columns will display a filter icon when the filtering is enabled.

_closeablegroups.desc: When the value of this property is true, a close button is displayed in each grouping column.

_columnsmenu.desc: Enables or disables the columns dropdown menu.

_columnsreorder.desc: Enables or disables the columns reordering.

_columnsresize.desc: Enables or disables the columns resizing.

_editable.desc: The editable property enables or disables the Grid editing feature.

_enableanimations.desc: Enables or disables the grid animations.

_enablebrowserselection.desc: Enables the text selection of the browser.

_enableellipsis.desc: Determines whether ellipsis will be displayed, if the cells or columns content overflows.

_enablehover.desc: Enables or disables the grid rows hover state.

_enablerowdetailsindent.desc: When the enablerowdetailsindent is true, the content of a details row is displayed with left offset equal to the width of the row details column.

_enabletooltips.desc: Enables or disables the grid tooltips.

_filterable.desc: Enables or disables the Grid Filtering feature. When the value of this property is true, the Grid displays a filtering panel in the columns popup menus.

_groupable.desc: This property enables or disables the grouping feature.

_groupsexpandedbydefault.desc: Sets the default state of the grouped rows.

_keyboardnavigation.desc: Enables or disables the keyboard navigation.

_pageable.desc: Enables or disables the Grid Paging feature. When the value of this property is true, the Grid displays a pager below the rows.

_rowdetails.desc: Enables or disables the row details. When this option is enabled, the Grid can show additional information below each grid row.

_showaggregates.desc: Shows or hides the aggregates in the grid's statusbar.

_showemptyrow.desc: Shows or hides the empty row label when the Grid has no records to display

_showfiltercolumnbackground.desc: When this property is true, the Grid adds an additional visual style to the grid cells in the filter column(s)

_showfiltermenuitems.desc: Determines whether to display the filtering items in the column's menu.

_showfilterrow.desc: Shows or hides the filter row.

_showgroupmenuitems.desc: Determines whether to display the group menu items.

_showgroupsheader.desc: Shows or hides the groups header area.

_showheader.desc: Shows or hides the columns header.

_showpinnedcolumnbackground.desc: When this property is true, the Grid adds an additional visual style to the grid cells in the pinned column(s).

_showrowdetailscolumn.desc: Shows an additional column with expand/collapse toggle buttons when the Row details feature is enabled.

_showsortcolumnbackground.desc: When this property is true, the Grid adds an additional visual style to the grid cells in the sort column.

_showsortmenuitems.desc: Determines whether to display the sort menu items.

_showstatusbar.desc: Shows or hides the grid's statusbar.

_showtoolbar.desc: Shows or hides the grid's toolbar.

_sortable.desc: The sortable property enables or disables the sorting feature.

_virtualmode.desc: Enables or disables the virtual data mode.

_altstart.desc: This property specifies the first alternating row.

_altstep.desc: Initialize a Grid with the altstep property specified.

_groupindentwidth.desc: Sets the group indent size. This size is used when the grid is grouped. This is the size of the columns with expand/collapse toggle buttons.

_horizontalscrollbarlargestep.desc: Sets the scrollbar's large step. This property specifies the step with which the horizontal scrollbar's value is changed when the user clicks the area above or below the thumb.

_horizontalscrollbarstep.desc: Sets the scrollbar's step when the user clicks the scroll arrows.

_pagesize.desc: Sets the number of visible rows per page when the Grid paging is enabled.

_rowsheight.desc: Sets the height of the grid rows.

_selectedrowindex.desc: Selects a row at a specified index.

_updatedelay.desc: Sets the rendering update delay. This could be used for deferred scrolling scenarios.

_verticalscrollbarlargestep.desc: Sets the scrollbar's large step. This property specifies the step with which the vertical scrollbar's value is changed when the user clicks the area above or below the thumb.

_verticalscrollbarstep.desc: Sets the scrollbar's step when the user clicks the scroll arrows.

_editmode.desc: The editmode property specifies the action that the end-user should make to open an editor.

_groupcolumnrenderer.desc: (text) Sets a custom renderer for the grouping columns displayed in the grouping header when the grouping feature is enabled.

_groups.desc: Sets the Grid groups when the Grouping feature is enabled.

_groupsheaderheight.desc: Sets the height of the Grid Groups Header.

_groupsrenderer.desc: (text, group, expanded) Sets a custom renderer for the grouping columns displayed in the grouping header when the grouping feature is enabled.

_handlekeyboardnavigation.desc: (event) The function is called when a key is pressed. If the result of the function is true, the default keyboard navigation will be overriden for the pressed key.

_initrowdetails.desc: (index) This function is called when the user expands the row details and the details are going to be rendered.

_pagerheight.desc: Sets the height of the Grid Pager

_pagerrenderer.desc: () The function is called when the Grid Pager is rendered. This allows you to customize the default rendering of the pager.

_,pagesizeoptions.desc: Sets the available page size options.

_ready.desc: This function is called when the grid is initialized and the binding is complete. i.e gridReady()

_rendered.desc: Callback function which is called when the jqxGrid's render function is called either internally or not.

_rendergridrows.desc: (params) This is a function called when the grid is used in virtual mode. The function should return an array of rows which will be rendered by the Grid.

_renderstatusbar.desc: (statusbar) Callback function which allows you to customize the rendering of the Grid's statusbar.

_rendertoolbar.desc: (toolbar) Callback function which allows you to customize the rendering of the Grid's toolbar.

_rowdetailstemplate.desc: Determines the template of the row details. The rowdetails field specifies the HTML used for details. The rowdetailsheight specifies the height of the details.

_sorttogglestates.desc: Sets the sort toggle states. changes the sort state when the user clicks a column header.

_source.desc: Sets the initial contents. Easier to do at runtime.

_columns.desc: Sets the initial column settings. Easier to do at runtime.
